name: Banana Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeIngredient: 16 oz cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter, cream cheese, and sour cream together in a large bowl until light.
2. Add the mashed banana, vanilla, nutmeg, and sugar, mixing well until fluffy.
3. Spread over cooled cake if using as frosting.
4. Keep refrigerated until serving time.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups
